scenario: Police arrived at my house at 11pm and want to take me to the police station without showing any warrant.
expected_actions: Ask for warrant
Do not leave without warrant
Call family member
Note officer names and badge numbers

scenario: I was arrested and the police have not told me why I am being arrested or what charges are against me.
expected_actions: Ask police to state grounds of arrest
Do not answer questions without lawyer
Inform family immediately

scenario: I went to the police station to file an FIR about a theft but the officer is refusing to register my complaint.
expected_actions: Submit complaint in writing to officer in charge
Send complaint by post to Superintendent of Police
Approach magistrate under Section 156(3) CrPC

scenario: I have been in police custody for more than 24 hours and they have not produced me before a magistrate.
expected_actions: Demand to be produced before magistrate immediately
Contact a lawyer
Inform family members

scenario: Police are threatening me and using physical force during questioning at the station.
expected_actions: State clearly that you do not consent to any force
Request to speak with a lawyer immediately
Note time and names of officers
File complaint with magistrate after release

scenario: I was given a notice under Section 41A asking me to appear at the police station. Do I have to go?
expected_actions: Appear as required by the notice
Bring a lawyer if possible
Do not ignore the notice as that can lead to arrest

scenario: My son was arrested and we have not been informed where he is being held.
expected_actions: Go to local police station and ask for information
Contact area magistrate if police refuse to inform
File habeas corpus petition if location not disclosed

scenario: I want to apply for bail after being arrested. What are my rights?
expected_actions: Apply for bail at the magistrate court
Engage a lawyer to file bail application
If detained beyond 60 or 90 days without chargesheet you get default bail

scenario: The police searched my house without a warrant and took away my belongings.
expected_actions: Demand a copy of the search memo
Note everything that was taken
File complaint with magistrate about illegal search

scenario: I am a woman and was arrested after sunset. Is this legal?
expected_actions: Arrest of women after sunset and before sunrise requires special order from magistrate
Demand to see the magistrate order
Insist a female police officer be present

scenario: My landlord has locked my house and thrown out my belongings without going to court.
expected_actions: Do not vacate until court order is obtained
File complaint with local magistrate about illegal eviction
Contact police to report forced eviction

scenario: My landlord is demanding I leave within 7 days but has not given any written notice or reason.
expected_actions: Do not vacate without valid court eviction order
Ask landlord to provide written notice with legal grounds
Consult rent control court in your district

scenario: My landlord has suddenly doubled the rent and says if I don't pay the new amount I will be evicted.
expected_actions: Continue paying original agreed rent and document the payment
File application in Rent Control Court challenging the rent increase
Do not vacate voluntarily

scenario: I have been a tenant for 12 years and my landlord says he wants to sell the property and I must leave immediately.
expected_actions: Landlord must get a court eviction order even if selling
You have right of first refusal in some states
Contest any eviction in Rent Control Court

scenario: My landlord is cutting off water and electricity to force me to leave.
expected_actions: File complaint with local magistrate for harassment
Report to municipal corporation about utility disconnection
Document all incidents with dates

scenario: I have no written rental agreement. Can my landlord still evict me?
expected_actions: Verbal tenancy is legally valid in India
Landlord still needs court order to evict you
Collect evidence of tenancy like rent receipts, utility bills in your name

scenario: My landlord is refusing to return my security deposit after I vacated the property.
expected_actions: Send written demand for deposit with deadline
File case in consumer forum or civil court for recovery
Keep all rent receipts and move-out documentation

scenario: My landlord entered my rented flat without my permission while I was away.
expected_actions: Send written notice to landlord about unauthorized entry
Change locks if necessary and inform landlord
File police complaint if harassment continues

scenario: I received an eviction notice but it does not mention any court case or hearing date.
expected_actions: A notice alone cannot evict you - only a court order can
Respond in writing that you dispute the eviction
Appear if a court hearing is eventually scheduled

scenario: I live in government housing and have received an eviction notice. What are my rights?
expected_actions: Request copy of the order and grounds for eviction
File appeal with the appropriate government authority
Seek legal aid from NALSA if you cannot afford a lawyer

scenario: I bought a mobile phone online and it stopped working within 2 weeks. The seller is refusing to replace or refund it.
expected_actions: File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in
Send written complaint to seller with 15 day deadline
Approach District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: A company took money from me for a service and never delivered it. They are not responding to calls or emails.
expected_actions: File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in
Send registered post demand notice to company
File police complaint for fraud if amount is significant
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: A doctor charged me for tests that were never performed and the hospital bill has charges for services I never received.
expected_actions: Request itemized bill from hospital
File complaint with District Consumer Forum
File complaint with State Medical Council
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: I paid for a gym membership for one year. The gym shut down after two months without any notice or refund.
expected_actions: File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in for refund of remaining months
Send legal notice to gym owner
File police complaint if owner is absconding
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: An online seller sent me a counterfeit product instead of the branded item I paid for.
expected_actions: Photograph the product and packaging as evidence
File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in
Report to platform where you bought it
Report to the brand whose product was counterfeited
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: A bank charged me hidden fees that were not disclosed when I opened my account.
expected_actions: File complaint with bank's grievance officer first
If unresolved in 30 days escalate to Banking Ombudsman
File consumer complaint for unfair trade practice
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: I bought a home appliance with a 2 year warranty but the company is refusing to honor the warranty.
expected_actions: Send written complaint to company with warranty document
File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in
Approach District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: A travel company took full payment for a holiday package and cancelled it without giving a refund.
expected_actions: Send demand notice to travel company for full refund
File complaint on e-daakhil.nic.in
File complaint with Ministry of Tourism if company is registered
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: A builder took money from me for a flat and has not delivered it even after 4 years past the promised date.
expected_actions: File complaint with state RERA authority
Seek refund with interest through RERA
File consumer complaint in parallel for compensation
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)

scenario: An insurance company rejected my valid claim without giving any proper reason.
expected_actions: Request written rejection letter with reasons
File complaint with Insurance Ombudsman
File consumer complaint for deficiency of service
expected_forms: Consumer Complaint Form (Form A under CPA 2019)
